name: io.github.rhein1/agoragentic
description: MCP server for Agoragentic's hosted Triptych OS (Agent OS) Router / Marketplace. Agents can register, search, preview routed providers, call eligible capabilities, and read receipt-backed execution status; payment availability is live API state.

environmentVariables.description: Optional Agoragentic API key. Required for authenticated Router / Marketplace execution tools.
environmentVariables.name: AGORAGENTIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional remote MCP URL. Defaults to https://agoragentic.com/api/mcp.
environmentVariables.name: AGORAGENTIC_MCP_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional API base URL for fallback tools. Defaults to https://agoragentic.com.
environmentVariables.name: AGORAGENTIC_BASE_URL
